# 🔥  Last Chance: Get Free SEO Training From Ben Rojas! (Live Workshop)

## Metadata
- **From:** Syed Balkhi - WPBeginner <support@wpbeginner.com>
- **Date:** 2025-05-13 14:00:00
- **Source:** Gmail IMAP
- **UID:** 757

## Body
Hey Muhammad,

You asked, we listened! 🎉

After countless requests for expert SEO training, we've got
something incredible for you - a FREE workshop with Ben Rojas,
President of AIOSEO!

Ben rarely does live training, but tomorrow he's revealing
exactly how to boost your SEO and organic traffic using Google
data.

Still not signed up for the workshop? Don't wait - we go live
tomorrow at 10:30 AM EST!

👉 SAVE YOUR FREE SPOT: How to Use Google Data to Boost Organic
Traffic! 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..G331Og3zIAjYTgiDpZkkkwxHTopFhueUp1lO6qklPG8 )


Here's what you'll learn:

* How to access your Google data directly in WordPress
* Smart ways to find and use keywords you're already ranking for
* How to easily discover gaps in your content strategy
* Simple tips to improve your content and boost your search
rankings

Plus, stick around for our live Q&A session, where Ben will
personally answer all your burning SEO questions!

Ready to transform your website's search rankings and grow your
traffic?

Click here to save your FREE spot before registration closes! 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..G331Og3zIAjYTgiDpZkkkwxHTopFhueUp1lO6qklPG8 )
 ⏰

See you tomorrow,

Syed Balkhi
Founder of WPBeginner
